query: SELECT event, count() AS total, count(DISTINCT properties.$session_id) AS sessions FROM events WHERE timestamp >= '2026-03-29' AND timestamp <= '2026-04-19' AND properties.$ip != '137.103.50.217' AND event NOT IN ('$pageview','$pageleave','$autocapture','$web_vitals','$feature_flag_called','$opt_in','$identify','$groupidentify','$set','$exception') GROUP BY event ORDER BY total DESC
